name: Suncorp Stadium
access_notes: Use surrounding streets rather than the immediate gate crowd where possible.
public_transport_notes: Milton station and nearby bus stops support event movement.
parking_notes: Event parking and road controls vary by event.

name: Queensland Tennis Centre
access_notes: Primary venue access is via King Arthur Terrace, Softstone Street, or Fairfield Road. Avoid relying on internal car parks during major events.
public_transport_notes: Yeronga station is about 1 km away according to the venue website; venue FAQ also notes Yeerongpilly station is about 800 m away.
parking_notes: On-site parking is normally available but may be unavailable during major tournaments, so pickup guidance should prefer public street pickup zones.

name: Chandler Sports Precinct
address: Sleeman Sports Complex, Old Cleveland Road, Chandler QLD 4155
access_notes: Large precinct with several internal facilities; pickup guidance should prefer public road edges on Old Cleveland Road and Tilley Road rather than internal event crowds.
public_transport_notes: Bus access serves the Sleeman Sports Complex area; event shuttles may vary by event.
parking_notes: Large on-site parking exists but may be controlled during major events, so external pickup options should be retained.

name: Brisbane Showgrounds
event_context: showgrounds and arena event exit flow
access_notes: Dense inner-city venue with multiple gates; pickup guidance should use Bowen Hills, Fortitude Valley, and Spring Hill road edges depending on closures.
public_transport_notes: Exhibition station, Fortitude Valley station, Bowen Hills station and bus corridors support high event demand.
parking_notes: Parking is constrained during Ekka and major events; curbside pickup should avoid the immediate Gregory Terrace crowd pressure.

name: Ballymore Stadium
access_notes: Residential and hospital-adjacent roads require careful pickup filtering; prioritise Clyde Road and controlled shuttle-access points over narrow local streets.
public_transport_notes: Bus access is available, with nearby Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital transport connections.
parking_notes: Limited venue parking; event plans may use remote or shuttle parking, so driver access scoring is important.

name: Brisbane Arena
address: Roma Street precinct, Brisbane City QLD 4000
event_context: planned inner-city arena event exit flow
access_notes: Future inner-city arena planning area near Roma Street; pickup guidance should account for CBD kerb controls, rail station access, and high pedestrian volumes.
public_transport_notes: Roma Street station and CBD bus connections make this highly transit-rich, but ride pickup should avoid station frontage bottlenecks.
parking_notes: CBD parking and loading zones are highly managed; live road closure data will be important before final recommendations.

name: Brisbane Aquatic Centre
address: Sleeman Sports Complex, Old Cleveland Road, Chandler QLD 4155
access_notes: Located inside Chandler Sports Precinct; pickup guidance should separate pool crowd exits from broader precinct traffic and prefer outer road pickup points.
public_transport_notes: Bus access serves the Chandler precinct, with event-specific transport arrangements likely for large meets.
parking_notes: On-site parking is available but event demand can be high; maintain fallback pickup points on surrounding roads.
